text: Copper honest, silver quick—what are you buying? Secundus eats what it cannot sell, so keep your purse close in this crowd.
speaker: Market Trader

text: I get clay from the river wards, salt from the harbor tithe, and rumor from every apprentice who thinks Veneficturis makes them clever.
speaker: Market Trader

text: If a Red-rank child waves a wand like a banner, smile and step aside. Pride draws pickpockets the way fruit draws wasps.
speaker: Market Trader
